title: Create: Tradeworks
description: Adds a new set of custom table cloths, in different shapes
body:
Create: Tradeworks is a decorative mod that adds several new Table cloths with different style and shape.

## Side Shelf
![Side Shelves](https://github.com/LIUKRAST/Tradeworks/blob/master/showcase_side_shelf.png?raw=true)

## Shelf
![Normal Shelves](https://github.com/LIUKRAST/Tradeworks/blob/master/showcase_shelf.png?raw=true)

## Metal Shelf
![Metal shelves](https://github.com/LIUKRAST/Tradeworks/blob/master/showcase_metal_shelf.png?raw=true)

## Inverted Table Cloth
I always wondered why the black table cloth has a complete different style than the other colors, and so I decided to make that style for all colors (and normal black one!)
![Inverted table cloths](https://github.com/LIUKRAST/Tradeworks/blob/master/showcase_inverted.png?raw=true)
